questionHtml: Describe the use of gene knockout technology in research.
markschemeHtml:
1.  gene knockout technology is a genetic engineering technique/intentional alteration in the sequence of a  gene;
  2.  making a gene inactive;
  3.  using site specific nucleases / CRISPR;
  4.  researcher observes changes in phenotype of organism;
  5.  allows researcher to determine function of the gene;
  6.  entire library of knockout organisms exists;
  7.  made available to researchers;

meta.title: Describe the use of gene knockout technology in research.
breadcrumbLabels: D1.3.8. Gene knockout as a technique for investigating the function of a gene by changing it to make it inoperative
